biography: Lauri is a familiar face around Jyväs-Golf, known for his meticulous approach to the game and an unwavering commitment to practice. While outwardly reserved, Lauri is said to possess a dry wit that endears him to those who know him well.

With one past appearance at the Hector Trophée, Lauri brings a level of experience to the course. Although he has yet to capture the coveted Hector Trophée or the Victor Trophy, his dedication suggests that he is always striving to improve.

Currently considered retired from Hector Trophée events, Lauri will not be participating in the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026. However, golf enthusiasts know that anything is possible, and a last-minute change to the field is not entirely out of the question.
